                                  </div>
                                </div>
                                <div aria-hidden="true" style={{display: "block", position: "static", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "visible", flexFlow: "row", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "1", fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif", fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: "400", lineHeight: "15px", textAlign: "start", color: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderColor: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", strokeWidth: "1px"}} />
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div data-orientation="vertical" data-state="visible" data-testid="scroll-area-scrollbar" style={{position: "absolute", top: "0px", right: "0px", bottom: "var(--radix-scroll-area-corner-height)", -RadixScrollAreaThumbHeight: "707.9968944099379px", display: "flex", left: "2275px", width: "10px", height: "829px", padding: "2px", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "visible", zIndex: "3", flexFlow: "row", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "1", fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif", fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: "400", lineHeight: "15px", textAlign: "start", color: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderColor: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", strokeWidth: "1px"}}>
        <div data-state="visible" style={{width: "6px", height: "707.99px", transform: "matrix(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0)", display: "block", position: "relative", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "visible", flexFlow: "row", flex: "1 1 0%", fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif", fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: "400", lineHeight: "15px", textAlign: "start", color: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(238, 239, 241, 0.2)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderColor: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", borderRadius: "12px", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", strokeWidth: "1px"}} />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  );
}
